title: Life on Mars Destroyed by Nuclear War! (Ft. Dr. John Brandenburg)
summary: Dr. John Brandenburg discusses his theory that Mars once harbored an advanced civilization that was destroyed by a thermonuclear holocaust, based on isotopic evidence (xenon-129 and argon-40) found in the Martian atmosphere. He also covers his work discovering the Martian ocean, archaeological structures on Mars including the Face at Cydonia, and his interactions with Carl Sagan regarding these findings.

acronyms.definition: Brandenburg's unified field theory attempting to marry gravity and electromagnetism
Technology used for blocking digital pickpockets in wallets
NASA research facility involved in Mars exploration
Research institute where the Mars investigation was headquartered and where remote viewing program operated
A type of meteorite that represents old lake bottom material from other planets

events.description: Viking missions landed on Mars and tested soil for life, photographed surface including Face at Cydonia
Able Archer crisis brought US and USSR close to nuclear war, classified at the time
Brandenburg presented paper on Martian ocean at scientific conference

key_claims.claim: A colonel on the Joint Chiefs of Staff confirmed to Brandenburg that there is a UFO cover-up
Mars atmosphere contains super-abundant xenon-129 and argon-40, isotopes typically produced by hydrogen bomb explosions or supernovas
Brandenburg discovered the Martian ocean by tracing shoreline elevation contours around the planet
NASA was overruled by unknown authorities preventing Viking lander from landing at Cydonia
Carl Sagan called Brandenburg asking why he was causing trouble regarding Mars archaeology findings
A package Brandenburg mailed to Carl Sagan containing Mars face photos never arrived
There is a second face on Mars at Utopia that resembles the Cydonia face
Scientists at JPL privately acknowledge evidence of past life on Mars but won't speak publicly
Andrei Sakharov confirmed that the Soviets would never have stopped working on the hydrogen bomb regardless of US actions
